HGSS.703.0001:
Don’t young people fish anymore?\f
I can teach you how to fish well, if
you’d like to exchange phone\r
numbers with me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.703.0002:
That’s great!
I’m happy to have made a\r
younger friend!
HGSS.703.0003:
Oh...\f
My own kids won’t even give me their
phone numbers...\f
I guess that’s just how young people
are these days.
HGSS.703.0004:
Hm? Oh, so you would like to be my
friend after all?! [0200,0000]
HGSS.703.0005:
If you’re nearby, let’s just talk
face-to-face!
HGSS.703.0006:
I’ve been spending more time with my
[0100,000A,0000] than I have with my kids.\r
That’s a bit sad, actually.\f
You call your mom sometimes, too!
HGSS.703.0007:
I just beat a wild [0100,000B,0000].
I told my kid, but he scoffed that he\r
could do the same thing easily.\f
Boy, has he gotten cocky...\f
You call your mom sometimes, too!
HGSS.703.0008:
Yesterday a wild [0100,000B,0000] slipped
away from me in front of my kid.\r
I was feeling down about it until he\r
shared his Poké Balls with me.\f
Hahah, that sure made my day!\f
You call your mom sometimes, too!
HGSS.703.0009:
What do you say to a battle with me?
Good, you’re going to do it!\f
For a kid, you’re quite agreeable.
[0104,0003,0000] is the spot!
HGSS.703.0010:
So where are you? I’m waiting for you
to show up on [0104,0003,0000].\f
You shouldn’t make your elders wait!
HGSS.703.0011:
Hey, how are you doing?\f
I’m doing absolutely wonderful,
of course!\f
But when I say “...absolutely
wonderful,” am I talking about fishing?\r
Am I talking about Pokémon?\r
Which is it?\f
Ha ha ha!
It’s both, of course!
